name: First Fsb Of Mascoutah
description_short: First Federal Savings Bank of Mascoutah is an FDIC-insured community bank offering personal and business banking services across three Illinois locations with online and mobile banking access.
description_long:
First Federal Savings Bank of Mascoutah is a community-focused financial institution operating as a federally-insured savings bank with headquarters in Mascoutah, Illinois. The bank has been serving its local community and has expanded to include branch locations in New Baden and Lebanon, Illinois. As an FDIC-insured institution, deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing security for customer funds.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of banking products including personal and business checking and savings accounts, certificate of deposit (CD) products, and online banking services. Their digital offerings include a user-friendly website interface, online banking portal with separate personal and business login options, and mobile banking applications available through both Apple App Store and Google Play. Current promotional rates include 6-month and 9-month CD specials at 3.85% APY with a $1,000 minimum deposit requirement.

First Federal Savings Bank positions itself as a community bank with emphasis on personalized, local service. The institution maintains dedicated in-person support at three physical branch locations and provides toll-free customer service at 1-888-415-3279, with a separate line for lost or stolen debit cards. Their messaging emphasizes a local team providing personalized attention to customer financial needs rather than a large national institution approach.

The bank operates as a traditional community savings bank without evidence of specialized lending products like personal loans, credit products, or investment services beyond basic deposit accounts and CDs. Customer support explicitly warns against sending sensitive information via email, indicating standard banking security protocols. The institution appears well-established but maintains a focused product offering typical of regional community banks rather than full-service banking enterprises. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Customer service via phone and email
Lost or stolen debit card reporting line
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full U.S. Government protection
Three convenient branch locations in Illinois (Mascoutah, New Baden, Lebanon)
Competitive CD rates at 3.85% APY on 6-month and 9-month terms
Dual online banking platform with separate personal and business account access
Mobile banking apps available on both iOS and Android platforms
Local community bank model emphasizing personalized customer service
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to three Illinois locations only
No evidence of comprehensive lending products (personal loans, mortgages, business lines of credit)
Website content does not detail savings account rates or checking account features
Relatively high $1,000 minimum deposit requirement for CD products
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or advisory services
best_for: Illinois residents in Mascoutah, New Baden, or Lebanon seeking a local community bank
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance protection and in-person banking relationships
Savers interested in fixed-term CD products with competitive promotional rates
Small business owners needing local banking relationships with personal service
diagnosis: First Federal Savings Bank of Mascoutah is best suited for Illinois residents in its service areas who value local, personalized banking relationships and FDIC protection for deposits. The main caveat is the bank's limited geographic reach and apparent absence of comprehensive lending products, making it unsuitable for customers needing mortgages, personal loans, or business financing beyond basic deposit services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured community bank offering checking and business banking across three Illinois locations.
